creator: antjpark@iu.edu
text:
Indeed; cron-core was not installed.  That has been corrected and our Puppet6 systems are behaving as-expected once again.  Thank you!

Also; Yes, I agree.  Previous instances where a core module was missing caused puppet to fail hard in a glorious way.  Also of note:  I have a few Debian machines running Puppet6 as well and they were handling Crons okay without the cron-core module. Previously missing modules (from our pup5=>6 migration) caused both platforms to fail gloriously.  Having Debian/puppet work and FreeBSD/puppet fail threw me in the wrong direction completely...this is what I get for trusting a computer :) 

I'm going to go ahead and mark the ticket closed, not a bug.

Cheers, 

A.
